message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class MainActivity {
  camera
  duration
  --
  showActiveMeasurement()
  hideActiveMeasurement()
  createMeasurement()
  showResult()
}

class ResultActivity {
  Measurement
  --
  displayResult()
  backToMainActivity()
  onCreate()
}

class Measurement {
  camera
  int[] redValues
  int imgPerSecond
  --
  captureImage() : ImageFile
  start() : void
  analyzeImage(imageFile) : int
  calculateREsult(): int
}

class File

class ImageFile {
  File image
  --
  cropImage() : void
  toValue() : float[]
}

ImageFile --|> File

@enduml
